title: Senior Client Partner - South Korea
description:
Senior Client Partner – Global Payments Company
Location: Singapore
Employment Type: 12 month engagement, renewable and convertible


🌍 The opportunity

As a Senior Client Partner, you’ll be at the heart of our fast‑moving APAC commercial team. Your mission? Supercharge growth with our banking and financial services partners, with a sharp focus on the South Korea market.

You’ll spot opportunities others miss, drive upsell and cross‑sell deals and build powerful relationships with decision‑makers who shape the future of payments. This is a hands‑on role where you’ll roll up your sleeves, lead conversations, and make things happen in a high‑growth, high‑impact environment.

🚀 Your Mission

  • Own and grow a portfolio of South Korean partners, driving revenue and transaction volumes to new heights.
  • Craft and execute smart account strategies that expand, retain, and strengthen partnerships.
  • Build influence with senior stakeholders – from CEOs to product managers – and lead impactful quarterly reviews.
  • Turn data into action, spotting opportunities and shaping strategic conversations with insight.
  • Team up across functions, working with product, engineering, and commercial teams to deliver innovative solutions.
  • Shape the future, contributing to global initiatives like product roadmap design, pricing strategies, and go to market plans.

💡 What We’re Looking For

We want a trailblazer who thrives in a fast paced, technical environment and is excited about building high growth businesses.

  • 8–10+ years driving success in Account Management, with a strong portfolio of banking / financial services clients.
  • Fluent in English and Korean, as you will be speaking with clients within South Korean banks & financial services partners. You will be managing the client relationship and articulating strategies for expansion and growth, as well as retention in a highly regulated market.
  • A proven revenue driver, with a track record of growing accounts and unlocking new opportunities.
  • Deep expertise in domestic and international payment schemes – bonus if you know SWIFT correspondent banking inside out.
  • Sharp understanding of the financial services landscape, especially the complexities of cross border payments.
  • Relationship builder extraordinaire – from CEOs to product managers, you know how to earn trust and influence.
  • Hands on and detail oriented, ready to lead partner calls, negotiate deals, and roll up your sleeves.
  • Technically savvy, able to solution with partners while navigating commercial and legal terms.
  • Passionate about transforming global payments and making a real impact.

🌟 Why apply?

  • Be part of a global fintech leader transforming the way money moves.
  • Work with top-tier banking & financial services partners.
  • Collaborate with diverse teams worldwide in a dynamic, innovative environment.
  • Shape the future of global payments and contribute to regional and global growth.
  • A culture of high trust, outcome first mindset, where people are empowered to act independently, communicate openly, and focus relentlessly on delivering meaningful value for their customers and partners, while working collaboratively across a globally distributed, culturally diverse team.
  • 12-month engagement is renewable and potential for conversion based on your performance and business approvals.
  • Relocation support if you are coming from another country.
  • Approximately 20-30% travel is required.

postedCompany.description:
ALLEGIS GROUP SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED

Allegis Group is the global leader in talent solutions focused on working harder and caring more than any other provider. We’ll go further to understand the needs of our people – our clients, our candidates, and our employees – and to consistently deliver on our promise of an unsurpassed quality experience. That’s the Allegis Group difference, and it’s consistent across every Allegis Group company. With more than US$11billion in annual revenues and over 500 locations across the globe, our network provides businesses with a comprehensive suite of talent solutions — without sacrificing the niche expertise required to ensure a successful partnership. Our specialised group of companies includes: Aerotek, TEKsystems, Allegis Global Solutions, Aston Carter, Major, Lindsey & Africa, Allegis Partners, MarketSource, and EASi. Visit www.AllegisGroup.com to learn more.

Allegis Group Singapore Pte Ltd, Company Reg No. 200909448N, EA Licence No. 10C4544
